style_suffix: 16-bit SNES style, flat colors with 3-tone shading, crisp pixels, solid black background, video game asset, centered
notes: Reference mockups for the mockup-driven art pass. Light direction is top-left across the set; shading is 3-tone banded flat shapes with no outlines; characters carry a dark ground-shadow ellipse.
